notes: PostgreSQL is a SQL database reached over the pg wire protocol, not a REST API, so there is no upstream machine spec. Synthesized an OpenAPI 3.0 HTTP facade from the adaptor surface: each public operation (sql, findValue, insert, insertMany, upsert/upsertMany, describeTable, insertTable, modifyTable) is modeled as a path whose request body mirrors the operation arguments and whose 200 response mirrors the node-postgres result shape (command/rowCount/rows/fields). Server URL is a mock placeholder.
